TCA Members - Example Roles: Quartile 1 band include, on average, a median entry-level product designer, a median entry-level hardware engineer, a median entry-level data scientist, or a median senior security analyst.

Low-mid quartile roles include, on average, a median senior marketing operations, a median entry-level sales engineer, a 75th percentile entry-level software engineer, or a median senior security analyst.
Mid-upper quartile roles include, on average, an 75th percentile senior recruiter, a 25th percentile senior sales engineer, a median senior hardware engineer, or a median senior ux researcher.

This top-paying quartile would contain high-level leadership roles including C-Suite and Vice President-level executives as well as top-tier technical roles like a 90th percentile senior product manager, a 75th percentile senior ux researcher.
